description: The 'Ndrina Crea is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Rizziconi, Calabria, Italy. It is involved in organized crime activities such as drug trafficking and extortion. The clan has been led by various bosses including Teodoro Crea and Giuseppe Crea, and has been targeted in multiple police operations. As of recent reports, the clan remains active.
